scripts.staging:build: npx vercel pull --yes --environment=preview --git-branch=develop && npx vercel build
scripts.staging:deploy: npx vercel pull --yes --environment=preview --git-branch=develop && npx vercel build && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --target=preview
scripts.preview:build: npx vercel pull --yes --environment=preview && npx vercel build
scripts.preview:deploy: npx vercel pull --yes --environment=preview && npx vercel build && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt
scripts.production:build: npx vercel pull --yes --environment=production && npx vercel build --prod
scripts.production:deploy: npx vercel pull --yes --environment=production && npx vercel build --prod && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
